title: CNN Explainer: Learning Convolutional Neural Networks with Interactive Visualization
summary: CNN Explainer tightly integrates a model overview that summarizes a CNN's structure, and on-demand, dynamic visual explanation views that help users understand the underlying components of CNNs. Through smooth transitions across levels of abstraction, our tool enables users to inspect the interplay between low-level mathematical operations and high-level model structures.
author: The Bible of AI
